# #9943 on-device finding — Android app lifecycle (API-34 emulator, ai.elizaos.app real WebView via CDP)
# App confirmed foreground (topResumedActivity) before backgrounding.

observer install: {"observersInstalled":true,"hasCapacitor":true,"capPlatform":"android","hasAppPlugin":false,"directListener":false,"href":"https://localhost/"}
backgrounding the app (KEYCODE_HOME)...
foregrounding the app (reorder existing task to front, no reload)...
App.addListener error: null
window.__lc type after foreground: object (undefined => WebView was RELOADED, lost observers)
direct Capacitor appStateChange (isActive) events: []
raw document.visibilitychange states: ["hidden","visible"]
app eliza:app-pause/resume events recorded: []
RESULT: pause=false resume=false
⚠️ events did not both fire (see array)
